title: CheesyCraft
description: Official Modpack for the Cheesy Brik minecraft server (mc.cheesybrik.com:21209)
body: CheesyCraft is the mod pack made for the my (Cheesy Brik) minecraft server. It is meant to be a fabric kitchen sink modpack for fun and atleast some performance, it's not guarnteed to run on lower end pcs but I've tried to include various performance mods to speed things up.
